title: Warning flood from continuity packs
description: Legacy continuity packs in ORGANS/ADMINISTRATUM/CONTINUITY/PACKS/ generate 117838 warnings, making verify_repo output noisy
symptoms: Hard to see real issues in warning flood
root_cause: Continuity packs contain historical files that trigger various checks

fix.description: Either clean up packs or exclude from scan
steps: Option A: Archive old packs outside repo
Option B: Add CONTINUITY/PACKS/ to scan exclusions
Option C: Fix issues in packs (time-consuming)

prevention.precheck_rule: Warning budget check before declaring PASS
